exercises.header: Please knock on the front door.
We live on the third floor.
The elevator goes to every floor.
exercises.answer: Το ασανσέρ πηγαίνει σε κάθε όροφο.

exercises.header: The basement is used for storage.
The car is in the basement.
We sit on the balcony in the evenings.
The balcony has a great view of the city.
exercises.answer: Το μπαλκόνι έχει θέα στην πόλη.

exercises.header: Please open the window, it is hot.
exercises.answer: Παρακαλώ άνοιξε το παράθυρο, κάνει ζέστη.

exercises.header: The window looks out onto the street.
The door of my room is always open.
exercises.answer: Η πόρτα του δωματίου μου είναι πάντα ανοιχτή.

exercises.header: The garden is full of flowers.
We spend weekends in the garden.
